postToolUse.bash: command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; files=$( { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- .github/workflows/*.yml .github/workflows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- .github/workflows/*.yml .github/workflows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- .github/workflows/*.yml .github/workflows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null; } | awk 'NF' | sort -u ); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "$files" | xargs actionlint || exit 2; fi
